info.title: anexya Cloud - Public API
info.description:
This document contains the necessary APIs fetch data of operations, orders, containers, and organizations.
Notes:
  - When using OAuth2 to get an access token, contact the support team to get the client_id and client_secret.

get.description: List the latest operations. Operations are sorted based on the end date by descending order.

parameters.name: typeId
parameters.description: The operation type ID to filter against

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: The organization ID to filter against

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: The date from which to start listing operations. Please note that it must be URL encoded.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: The date to which to end listing operations. Please note that it must be URL encoded.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of records to be returned within a single page

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: The continuation token that was retrieved from the previous page. Fetched from the response header ats-continuation-token

ats-continuation-token.description: The continuation token to continue the pagination of operations

parameters.name: operationId
parameters.description: The operation ID

parameters.name: operationId
parameters.description: The operation ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of records to be returned within a single page

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: The continuation token that was retrieved from the previous page. Fetched from the response header ats-continuation-token

ats-continuation-token.description: The continuation token to continue the pagination of operation's items

get.summary: List serials of an item within an operation

parameters.name: operationId
parameters.description: The operation ID

parameters.name: operationItemId
parameters.description: The operation item ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of records to be returned within a single page

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: The continuation token that was retrieved from the previous page. Fetched from the response header ats-continuation-token

ats-continuation-token.description: The continuation token to continue the pagination of serialized item results of the operation item specified

404.description: Operation item not found within the specified operation

error.example: Operation item with ID "6b4a6db4-d644-44aa-87b5-5ed73a23ca96" not found within operation "4b4a6db4-d644-44aa-87b5-5ed73a23ca96"

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of records to be returned within a single page

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: The continuation token that was retrieved from the previous page. Fetched from the response header ats-continuation-token

ats-continuation-token.description: The continuation token to continue the pagination of operation types

get.description: This API allows the listing of organizations that are available in the account

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of records to be returned within a single page

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: The continuation token that was retrieved from the previous page. Fetched from the response header ats-continuation-token

ats-continuation-token.description: The continuation token to continue the pagination of organizations

get.description: This API allows the listing of orders that are available

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of records to be returned within a single page

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: The continuation token that was retrieved from the previous page. Fetched from the response header ats-continuation-token

parameters.name: sourceOrganizationId
parameters.description: The ID of the organization which is considered the source organization of order

parameters.name: destinationOrganizationId
parameters.description: The ID of the organization which is considered the destination organization of order

ats-continuation-token.description: The continuation token to continue the pagination of organizations

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The order number

get.description: List the latest operations for a specific order number. Operations are sorted based on the end date by descending order.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The order number

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: The date from which to start listing operations. Please note that it must be URL encoded.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: The date to which to end listing operations. Please note that it must be URL encoded.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of records to be returned within a single page

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: The continuation token that was retrieved from the previous page. Fetched from the response header ats-continuation-token

ats-continuation-token.description: The continuation token to continue the pagination of operations

get.summary: List expected items by order number

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of records to be returned within a single page

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: The continuation token that was retrieved from the previous page. Fetched from the response header ats-continuation-token

ats-continuation-token.description: The continuation token to continue the pagination of items

get.description: List the latest operations for a specific container number. Operations are sorted based on the end date by descending container.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The container number

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: The date from which to start listing operations. Please note that it must be URL encoded.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: The date to which to end listing operations. Please note that it must be URL encoded.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of records to be returned within a single page

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: The continuation token that was retrieved from the previous page. Fetched from the response header ats-continuation-token

get.summary: List expected items by container number
get.description: List the expected items that are linked directly to an container by its number

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The container number

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of records to be returned within a single page

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: The continuation token that was retrieved from the previous page. Fetched from the response header ats-continuation-token

ats-continuation-token.description: The continuation token to continue the pagination of items

deleteTs.description: The timestamp when the record was deleted

deletedBy.description: The user that deleted the record

generated.description: True if the order has been generated during the operation
True if the order has been generated during the operation

synchronizedTs.description: The timestamp in which the operation was fully synchronized

partial.description: True if the operation is part of a group of operations and is not the final one

multiplier.description: The multiplier chosen by the user to multiply the number expected items during the input phase

url.description: The URL to which NFC tags are linked

trackingNumber.description: The tracking number linked to the audit operation

expectedAccuracy.description: Accuracy percentage based on the expected and found only

referenceCode.description: A code that is used as reference to link items with different systems

available.description: The available quantity in the stock at the time of conducting the operation
